offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inaccurate tracking of asset depreciation causes tax reporting errors. We provide a fixed asset tracking system instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of asset depreciation leads to tax reporting errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 assets
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
